title: vouchfx Community Provider Registry
description: JSON Schema for the vouchfx community provider index (community-providers.json). The registry lists community providers; the maintainer-awarded Vouched badge (see 'vouched') is the only endorsement marker.

items.title: Provider Entry
items.description: A single provider listed in the community registry

name.description: Human-readable name of the provider (e.g. 'Snowflake Assertion')

stepKindId.description: Step type identifier in the form 'family.provider' (e.g. 'db-assert.snowflake', 'mq-publish.mqtt'). Must not collide with a Core provider's step kind.

hosting.description: Where the provider's source lives: 'external' (the author's own repository — the default when absent) or 'hub' (contributed as source into this repository's community/ directory). Hub-hosted entries may omit 'nuget' until a package exists.

repo.description: URL to the provider's repository (must be HTTPS)

minEngineVersion.description: Minimum vouchfx engine version (SemVer format, e.g. '1.0.0', '1.1.0')

vouched.description: Maintainer-awarded Vouched badge per VOUCHED_CHECKLIST.md (rubric review after listing). Absence means not vouched. Only maintainers may set this field (gated by CODEOWNERS on /registry/).

vouchedVersion.description: The provider version (for external/NuGet-hosted providers) or commit SHA (for hub-hosted providers) that passed the Vouched review; the badge attests this version only — later releases are not covered until re-reviewed. Maintainer-set, like 'vouched'.

description.description: One-line summary of the provider's purpose
